message:
feat(search): configurable fusion backend selector with config-driven search pipeline

Extend the hybrid search pipeline to support pluggable fusion backends
selected via configuration rather than compile-time constants:

- SearchConfig: add quality_timeout_ms, fast_only, and fusion_backend
  fields with sensible defaults (200ms, false, "legacy")

- FusionBackend: extract parse() from from_env() so the same parsing
  logic works for both env-var and config-file selectors; add as_str()
  for canonical roundtrip serialization

- StorageHandle::hybrid_search_with_results: accept optional
  FusionBackend parameter, propagated through to the sync search core
  where it is resolved (config > env > legacy fallback)

- HybridSearchBundle: include fusion_backend in response metadata so
  callers can observe which backend was actually used

- MCP + CLI: add effective_search_fusion_backend() helpers reading
  from config.search.fusion_backend, threaded through all search
  call sites in both mcp.rs and main.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
